name: mds-design-system
description: Detects whether a repo uses MDS React, McKinsey Bootstrap, or vanilla CSS and guides developers to design pages, add components, set up styles, create data visualizations, and convert projects using MDS standards (tokens + component patterns). Enforces HTML/CSS best practices including external CSS files, semantic HTML, and accessibility. Provides CDN font references and static fallback guidance, icon guidance, layout patterns, table patterns, and dataviz color/labeling systems.
author: Tech Ecosystem Design and Insights (TEDI)
